name: Peanut Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Roasted, unsalted peanuts; measure fairly finely ground
1/2 cup Cashew nuts (scant); fairly finely ground
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter or vegan margarine in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Saute the onion and celery for 10 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in the herbes de Provence and flour, cooking an additional 1-2 minutes.
4. Add the vegetable stock (gelatin) and stir until thickened.
5. Incorporate the soy sauce, yeast extract, peanuts, cashews, breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper.
6. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
7. Form into 6 flat patties about 1/2 inch thick and coat with dried breadcrumbs on both sides.
8. Heat a small amount of oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
9. Cook the burgers for approximately 3 minutes on each side until browned and crispy, turning once halfway through.
10. Drain excess oil on paper towels before serving.
11. Garnish with lettuce leaves, tomato slices, and cucumber slices as desired.
